style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#1565c0;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-34"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-53" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#dee2e6;strokeWidth=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="300" x="1284" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-54" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=center;fontColor=#1a1a2e;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="KEY DESIGN PRINCIPLES" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="300" x="1284" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-55" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=top;" value="<b>1. Channel Agnosticism</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#6c757d">Sidecars are dumb pipes. Zero business<br>logic in the channel layer. Any new channel<br>= 1 new sidecar, zero core changes.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="1294" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-56" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=top;" value="<b>2. Sovereign Bus (Event-Driven)</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#6c757d">All communication via pub/sub topics.<br>14-field envelope with traceId, TTL,<br>hop count, idempotency, HMAC signatures.<br>No direct coupling between components.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="280" x="1294" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-57" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=top;" value="<b>3. Zero-Trust Security (3 Keys)</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#6c757d">Key 1: TOTP 2FA (all external channels)<br>Key 2: BCrypt sudo elevation (15 min)<br>Key 3: Guest mode (read-only, no tools)<br>Internal channels (CLI, IntelliJ) bypass.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="280" x="1294" y="275" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-58" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=top;" value="<b>4. Dual-Model LLM Architecture</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#6c757d">Rabbit (1.5b): Fast, local, ~50ms. Greetings,<br>simple queries, code completion.<br>Turtle (35b): Expert, remote, ~2-10s.<br>Complex reasoning, tool calling.<br>Hot-swap between GGUF/Ollama/Claude.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="280" x="1294" y="355" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-59" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=top;" value="<b>5. Fault Tolerance</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#6c757d">Circuit Breaker (3 fail / 30s open)<br>TTL expiration (30s default)<br>Hop count anti-loop (max 50)<br>Idempotency (SHA-256 dedup)<br>Virtual threads (no thread starvation)<br>Graceful degradation on LLM failure</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="280" x="1294" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-60" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#dee2e6;strokeWidth=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="600" x="30" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-61" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#e94560;strokeWidth=2.5;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="45" y="665" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="105" y="665" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-62" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="<font style="font-size:10px;">Ingress (Message In)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="130" x="110" y="655" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-63" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#4caf50;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="260" y="665" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="320" y="665" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-64" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="<font style="font-size:10px;">Egress (Response Out)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="325" y="655" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-65" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="<font style="font-size: 9px; color: rgb(173, 181, 189);">Fararoni Engineering | Schema v1.0 &nbsp;| Eber Cruz</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="500" x="350" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-66" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#E0F7FA,#663300);strokeColor=#00695c;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=11;" value="<b>SATI SIDERCAR MCP</b><br><font style="font-size: 9px; color: rgb(108, 117, 125);">STDIO-TUNNEL (OS Pipes)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="55" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-67" edge="1" parent="1" source="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-66" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#00695c;strokeWidth=1.5;entryX=-0.005;entryY=0.934;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="VQde40RSutQuRiYSP-yR-11"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="230" y="520" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="295" y="547" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.font:
Sidecars are dumb pipes. Zero business
logic in the channel layer. Any new channel
= 1 new sidecar, zero core changes.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 182px; margin-left: 1267px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.font:
All communication via pub/sub topics.
14-field envelope with traceId, TTL,
hop count, idempotency, HMAC signatures.
No direct coupling between components.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 262px; margin-left: 1267px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.font:
Key 1: TOTP 2FA (all external channels)
Key 2: BCrypt sudo elevation (15 min)
Key 3: Guest mode (read-only, no tools)
Internal channels (CLI, IntelliJ) bypass.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 342px; margin-left: 1267px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.font:
Rabbit (1.5b): Fast, local, ~50ms. Greetings,
simple queries, code completion.
Turtle (35b): Expert, remote, ~2-10s.
Complex reasoning, tool calling.
Hot-swap between GGUF/Ollama/Claude.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 432px; margin-left: 1267px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.font:
Circuit Breaker (3 fail / 30s open)
TTL expiration (30s default)
Hop count anti-loop (max 50)
Idempotency (SHA-256 dedup)
Virtual threads (no thread starvation)
Graceful degradation on LLM failure
